description: Renovate config for promptsheon. Runs alongside Dependabot (which covers Docker base images + GitHub Actions + Go modules); Renovate adds finer-grained batching for npm and pip SDKs and the option to group minor/patch updates across ecosystems. The two tools coexist by design — Dependabot owns the GitHub-integrated ecosystems, Renovate owns the source-tree ones.

packageRules.description: Group minor + patch updates for SDK packages so a single PR can bundle them.
Auto-merge patch-level Go module updates. The CI matrix runs go vet + go test on every PR, so patch-level bumps are safe to auto-merge.
